summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 11.2 refactor - payment, webhook, and admin routes extraction. All extracted functionality working correctly with zero endpoint contract changes.
passed_tests: Authentication endpoints working correctly (admin@eros.app and testing@test.com)
Admin endpoints extracted to routers/admin.py working correctly
Payment endpoints extracted to routers/payments.py working correctly
Webhook endpoints extracted to routers/webhooks.py working correctly
GET /api/admin/users returns proper user list for admin
GET /api/admin/reports returns proper reports list for admin
GET /api/admin/payment-config returns proper payment configuration for admin
GET /api/payments/packages returns proper package list for regular user
POST /api/webhook/stripe returns proper error without signature
POST /api/webhook/paypal returns proper error without event_id
POST /api/webhook/klarna returns proper error without order_id
Regular user gets 'Insufficient role' when accessing admin endpoints
All extracted routes maintain same URL structure and functionality
Server.py successfully reduced from 6432 to 4378 lines (-32%)
Legal, blog, and couples routes continue working from previous extraction
